title: 'I know she is proud of me' - matriculant pushes through loss
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  For many, passing your matric year is no easy task.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - For many, passing your matric year is no easy task."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Losing a parent while the stress of exams hovers throughout the year makes it even more of a challenge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This was the reality for Sao Bras High School matriculant Tyricq Uithaler.","html":"This was the reality for Sao Bras High School matriculant Tyricq Uithaler."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Uithaler was announced as the third of the school's top matric learners for 2025 before receiving his long-awaited National Senior Certificate results on Tuesday 13 January.","html":"Uithaler was announced as the third of the school's top matric learners for 2025 before receiving his long-awaited National Senior Certificate results on Tuesday 13 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The devastating loss of his mother paired with some challenges relating to his mental health made his Grade 12 success even sweeter.","html":"The devastating loss of his mother paired with some challenges relating to his mental health made his Grade 12 success even sweeter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"All those sleepless nights, all my tears were worth it,\" he said. \"It was a really difficult year, but without God, I wouldn't be standing here.\"","html":"\"All those sleepless nights, all my tears were worth it,\" he said. \"It was a really difficult year, but without God, I wouldn't be standing here.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is currently awaiting feedback from the University of the Western Cape, where he hopes to study law this year. \"I know she [his mother] is proud of me,\" he said.","html":"He is currently awaiting feedback from the University of the Western Cape, where he hopes to study law this year. \"I know she [his mother] is proud of me,\" he said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sao Bras High achieved a pass rate of 92.6%."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The school's principal, Henry Willemse, thanked both the learners and educators for their efforts throughout 2025, and hopes to reach a pass rate of 100% with this year's class of Grade 12 learners.","html":"The school's principal, Henry Willemse, thanked both the learners and educators for their efforts throughout 2025, and hopes to reach a pass rate of 100% with this year's class of Grade 12 learners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This is a product of hard work, dedication and faith in yourselves,\" he said.","html":"\"This is a product of hard work, dedication and faith in yourselves,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sao Bras High’s principal, Henry Willemse, and the school’s top three matric learners, Shanique Bruinders, Luchen Moolman and Tyricq Uithaler. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"Sao Bras High’s principal, Henry Willemse, and the school’s top three matric learners, Shanique Bruinders, Luchen Moolman and Tyricq Uithaler. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
